propertyPack.summaryDescription: Two-bedroom leasehold flat on the seventh floor of Riverside Court, a 12-storey block built in 2007 with partially remediated ACM cladding and an EWS1 B2 rating.

overCommercialPremises.details: Ground-floor commercial unit (cafe) below the residential block.

isStandardForm.details: Reinforced concrete frame with curtain-wall cladding system. Original ACM (aluminium composite material) panels partially remediated in 2022; non-ACM combustible elements remain on lower-level balcony soffits, captured as a B2 rating on the EWS1 form.

buildingSafety.details: Combustible cladding components on lower balcony soffits; EWS1 rating B2 (PAS 9980 assessment, 2024-03-12). Original ACM panels were removed and replaced with A2-rated material on the upper storeys in 2022.
buildingSafety.workAlreadyDone: Removal and replacement of ACM panels above the fourth floor (completed October 2022, freeholder-funded under the Building Safety Fund).
buildingSafety.workToBeDone: Replacement of combustible balcony soffits on floors 1-3; scoped at approximately £180k across the block, funded under the Building Safety Levy. Programme due to start Q4 2026.
buildingSafety.potentialCost: Service-charge contribution capped under the Building Safety Act 2022; leaseholder liability nil for qualifying leases.
buildingSafety.abilityToResideAtProperty: No impact on occupation; works are external balcony soffits accessed by scaffold.

itemsToRemove.details: Bedroom curtains, kitchen extractor hood (replaced with a fitted unit by the buyer), and the freestanding bookshelves in the second bedroom.

itemsToInclude.details: Integrated dishwasher, washer-dryer, fridge-freezer; all blinds; bathroom mirror cabinet; smart thermostat (Nest).

boilerImmersionHeater.comments: Communal heat-pump system serving the block; the in-flat heat interface unit (HIU) is included.

roofInsulation.comments: Flat within a block; roof insulation is a block-level concern, not flat-level.

windowFittings.comments: Powered roller blinds in the living room; manual blinds elsewhere.

doorbellChime.comments: Video entryphone handset connected to the building intercom.

otherItems.comments: Linked to the HIU; account transfer to be arranged after completion.

chimneyStacks.description: No chimney stacks; flat within a 12-storey block.

roofCoverings.description: Block-level roof; not within scope of an in-flat Level 2 inspection.
roofCoverings.restriction: Communal roof inaccessible to a Level 2 surveyor.

rainwaterPipesGutters.description: Communal downpipe serving the kitchen elevation shows ponding at the hopper head visible from the balcony.
rainwaterPipesGutters.defects: Hopper-head blockage and minor staining to the cladding panel beneath; remedial cleaning recommended by the block managing agent.
rainwaterPipesGutters.advisories: Refer to the managing agent for a roof-level inspection and gutter clearance; cost likely absorbed in cyclical service-charge works.
